'''Blathar III''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. At one time it was visited by the exotics dealer [[Rufus Trammel]], who harvested a number of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] native specimens. After Trammel's departure from the moon, non-native viruses wiped out most of the moon's plant life. Trammel sold many of his specimens to the government of Blathar III, in a deal that some speculated netted him up to three million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
